elements.name: The Magic Realm
elements.summary: 'The way the world could be' — better versions of mundane things; beasts of virtue, elementals, spirits, ancient sites. Vivid, vis-rich auras boost Hermetic magic.
elements.wants: Its beings embody an essential nature and are largely indifferent to humanity; they pursue their nature relentlessly.
elements.as_character: A proud magical being acting utterly in-character to its essence.
elements.as_thread: A magical site, beast, or spirit must be dealt with on its own terms.

elements.name: The Faerie Realm
elements.summary: Beings drawn from human stories who feed on Vitality when humans play out their tales; tricksters bound by roles and bargains. Auras run high; +½ to Hermetic magic.
elements.wants: To steer humans into a story role and harvest the emotion; honours the letter of a deal, exploits the wording.
elements.as_character: A glamorous, literal-minded fae playing its part.
elements.as_thread: A faerie bargain or tale ensnares the covenant.

elements.name: The Divine Realm
elements.summary: God's power; the Dominion around churches, ubiquitous and crushing to non-Divine magic (−3× aura). Angels, saints, relics, True Faith; miracles cannot fail or be resisted.
elements.wants: To enforce God's order — protect the faithful, oppose the Infernal, turn sinners back.
elements.as_character: A saint, angel, or person of True Faith, an instrument of higher command.
elements.as_thread: A holy site, relic, or heresy-hunt confronts the covenant.

elements.name: The Infernal Realm
elements.summary: Evil and corruption; demons are fallen angels who tempt, deceive, and damn, envying humanity. Infernal lies cannot be pierced by magic; infernal vis is shunned.
elements.wants: To corrupt and damn souls; never bargains honestly; impatient, so it recruits diabolists.
elements.as_character: A demon in a tempting disguise, every word a trap.
elements.as_thread: An infernal temptation or diabolist works corruption within reach.
